---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new tool or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

**What tool or feature would you like?**
A clear description of the feature.

**Use case**
How would you use this? What problem does it solve?

**Jira API endpoint (if known)**
Link to the relevant Atlassian REST API docs.

**Would you be willing to contribute this?**
Yes / No / Maybe
